attributes.description: Living-Off-The-Land Binaries — legitimate signed Windows utilities frequently abused for execution, lateral movement, defense evasion, and download. Subset from the LOLBAS project: regsvr32, rundll32, mshta, certutil, bitsadmin, installutil, msbuild, regasm, regsvcs, wmic, wscript, cscript, msiexec, forfiles, esentutl, makecab, expand, diskshadow, atbroker, ftp, dnscmd, odbcconf, xwizard, scriptrunner, presentationhost. The command_line column is where the intent lives — always inspect it.
attributes.title: Volatility: LOLBINS (Living-Off-The-Land binaries)
